title: Salter BW13693EU7 Toronto Serving Board – 60 cm Acacia Wooden Cutting Board, Large Grazing Board, FSC®- Certified Wood, Rectangular Charcuterie Board with Paddle Handle, Hanging Hoop, Easy Clean
features: 60 CM SERVING BOARD: Prepare, cut, and serve your favourite foods in style using the Salter Toronto Serving Board. Its generous 60 cm length allows you to neatly arrange a variety of your favourite cured meats, cheese and more.
ACACIA WOOD: This serving board is crafted from 100% FSC- Certified acacia wood for a traditional look and guarantees endless performance to withstand all your food preparation needs.
EASY TO CLEAN: Simply clean by hand for the easiest of maintenance. The wooden materials won’t rust over time like metal, making this grazing board a long-lasting choice.

SERVING HANDLE: Designed with a long, serving handle, you can easily transport foods straight from the board to the table. Thanks to the convenient hanging hoop, you can keep your countertops clutter-free.
GET THE TORONTO SET: Why not have it all? Coordinate your kitchen with the matching Salter Toronto range. Including kettles, toasters, microwaves and more.
